name: Portia Featherington
ability: Each night*, swap alignment, even if dead.
flavor: Nothing makes the ton come alive like a fresh scandal.

firstNightReminder: They choose a player. The chosen player chooses which convoluted way they must speak.
otherNightReminder: They choose a player. The chosen player chooses which convoluted way they must speak.
name: Baffler
ability: Each night, choose a living player: tomorrow, they must vote for every nomination as long as there are 5 or more players alive & must speak in rhymes, riddles, or another convoluted way, or might be executed.
flavor: The guzzling puzzle is a perplexing muzzle.

name: Baroness
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they might die. Good Minions do not learn or are shown in Minion or Demon info. [0 Townfolk. +0 to +2 Good Minions]
flavor: Not my circus, not my monkeys. But I'm the ringmaster of this carnival and, I promise, it is the greatest show you are ever going to see.

firstNightReminder: Ask a player to potentially make a wish. Run it as possible.
otherNightReminder: Ask a player to potentially make a wish. Run it as possible.
name: Monkey's Paw
ability: Each night, a player might be told they may make a wish. The wish, if granted, might have a price, leave a clue as to its nature, or be granted unfavorably.
flavor: Never mind, dear... perhaps you'll win the next one.
